title: Savory Shaggy Venezuelan Eggplant Skewers
description: A funky and shaggy Venezuelan dish featuring eggplant, sashimi-cut, perfect for a hangover cure, made without onion or garlic.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, paprika, and cumin.
Add the sashimi-cut eggplant slices to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated eggplant slices, cherry tomatoes, and fresh cilantro onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the eggplant is tender and lightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with crumbly feta cheese.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional fresh cilantro if desired.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
